requirements.requirement: Sandbox browser, local browser, and desktop session kinds are typed.
requirements.evidence: RuntimeManagedSessionCard.kind emits sandbox_browser, local_browser, or desktop.

requirements.requirement: Observe/take-over/return control are runtime state transitions.
requirements.evidence: control_thread persists managed_session_control records and inspect_thread replays the new control state.

requirements.requirement: Waiting-for-user state exists for login, CAPTCHA, payment, file picker, or other manual-only action.
requirements.evidence: Managed session snapshot maps manual wait reasons to captcha/login/payment/file_picker/manual_action.

requirements.requirement: Screenshot quarantine/redaction is enforced before persistence.
requirements.evidence: Raw captures are marked runs_tracing, product previews require sanitized_screenshot_ref or preview_ref.
inspect_thread derives replayable managed sessions from persisted parent playbook state and persisted control records; live GUI reload proof remains open.
